raw_title: Beyond “Emergencies?" Reporting on Humanitarian Issues Around the World
title_en: Beyond “Emergencies?” Reporting on Humanitarian Issues Around the World
title_zh: 超越“紧急情况？”：全球人道主义议题报道研究
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了新闻报道如何超越仅仅关注紧急事件，更全面地报道全球人道主义议题。它可能分析了记者如何报道长期的人道主义问题，而不仅仅是突发危机。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how news reporting goes beyond just covering emergencies to provide more comprehensive coverage of humanitarian issues worldwide. It likely analyzes how journalists report on long-term humanitarian problems, not just sudden crises.
research_direction_zh: 探索人道主义新闻报道的深度与广度，研究媒体如何超越危机事件报道框架，关注系统性人道主义问题及其长期影响。
research_direction_en: Exploring the depth and breadth of humanitarian journalism, investigating how media move beyond crisis-event reporting frameworks to address systemic humanitarian issues and their long-term impacts.
